content_body: It was perfect. The cabin was amazing. Sophisticated and rustic at the same time. Better than any cabin out of a magazine. We enjoyed the commercial grade kitchen, massive wood burning stacked stone fireplaces, and very comfortable beds. Relaxation at its finest. Just what my husband needed to take a break from his stressful job in the city. We have rented from Cabin Rentals of Georgia several times and each time is better than the last.
title: Each Stay Has Been Better Than The Last!
